label: Narrated Still
desc: Submit inventory to the video-from-audio-and-jpg processor. Requires 'image' and 'audio' in inventory. Optionally stores output files back into inventory under the configured keys.

params.name: videoKey
params.label: Store video.mp4 as
params.helpText: Video created from the still image and audio track. Leave blank to skip.

params.name: coverKey
params.label: Store cover.avif as
params.helpText: 1024×1024 AVIF compressed still image. Leave blank to skip.

params.name: textKey
params.label: Store text.md as
params.helpText: Title and body text content. Leave blank to skip.
